title: TMBU Admission 2026-27 Overview

detail.title: TMBU Admission 2026-27 Overview
detail.short_info: Tilka Manjhi Bhagalpur University (TMBU) Admission 2026-27 is open. Apply online till 19 May 2026 for BA, BSc & BCom courses. Check full schedule, eligibility, merit list dates & direct link.

content.text: Tilka Manjhi Bhagalpur University (TMBU) Admission 2026-27 for Undergraduate CBCS programmes (Session 2026-2030) is now open. Online applications started on 5 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 19 May 2026.

Tilka Manjhi Bhagalpur University (TMBU) Admission 2026-27 has officially begun for 4-year undergraduate BA, B.Sc, and B.Com (Honours & General) courses under the CBCS semester system. Students seeking admission in Bihar’s reputed university can now apply online through the Samarth portal till 19 May 2026.

The entire admission process is merit-based on Class 12th marks. The university will release multiple merit lists, followed by on-spot admission for vacant seats. This is a golden opportunity for fresh 10+2 pass-outs to secure seats in one of the top universities of Bihar. Candidates are advised to apply early, fill the form carefully, and keep all required documents ready to avoid last-minute issues. (98 words)

sections.heading: Important Dates for TMBU UG Admission 2026-27

rows: Last date of Submission of Admission form online
Publication of 1st Merit list & Cut-off list
Admission Start on First Merit list
Last date of Admission on First Merit list
Last date of Validation of Admission by college
Publication of 2nd Merit list & Cut-off List
Admission Start on Second Merit list
Last date of Admission on Second Merit list
Last date of Validation of Admission by college
Publication of 3rd Merit list & Cut-off list
Admission Start on Third Merit list
Last date of Admission on Third Merit list
Last date of Validation of Admission by college
Passed 10+2 in any stream from a recognized board
Passed 10+2 in any stream (Commerce preferred for Hons)

content.text: Note: Minimum marks: Usually 45% aggregate (relaxation for reserved categories as per Bihar govt. norms).
The application fee is payable online. The exact amount is displayed on the portal during form submission (generally ₹200–₹500 depending on category).

sections.heading: How to Apply for TMBU Bhagalpur University Admission 2026-27 (Step-by-Step)

items: Click on “New Registration” and register with a valid mobile number and email.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Upload required documents (Photo, Signature, Marksheets, Category Certificate).
Pay the application fee and submit the form.
Take a printout of the confirmation page.
